name: Sweet Pareve Noodle Kugel
recipeIngredient: 1 cup margarine (1 stick), cut into pieces
1 can crushed pineapple in its own juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9-by-13-inch baking dish.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
3. Cook noodles in boiling salted water for 10 minutes; drain well.
4. Place hot noodles in a mixing bowl; add margarine and mix until melted.
5. In another bowl, stir together eggs, sugar, salt, vanilla, lemon juice, apricot preserves, and crushed pineapple with juice. Add to noodles along with raisins and apples. Mix well.
6. Pour into prepared pan.
7. Sprinkle with corn flakes; stir together cinnamon and sugar and sprinkle on top.
8. Bake for 45 minutes to 1 hour until lightly browned.
Nutritional info per serving: 323 calories; 6g protein, 50g carbohydrates, 12g fat (33%), 1g fiber, 107mg cholesterol, 351mg sodium
From the recipe files of Carole Walberg
